effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Atop the waves that don't align, is the flow that will reach you tomorrow-♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: This irrelevant lifestyle is what the lovely Rhyme prefers--!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This is much easier than our training back in the village~♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), you may choose a grade 1 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC) as [Rest].
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Fast and fast ~! The late child will tickle!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top card of your deck, call it to an open (RC) or put it into your hand. If you put a card into your hand, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Are you going to eat too?

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have three or more open (RC), this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to an open (RC).

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), bind the top card of your deck.
White Wings-[CONT](VC):When you would ride from your ride deck, you may "Soul Blast (1)" instead of "Choose a card from your hand, and discard it".
Black Wings-[CONT](VC):All of your opponent's grade 1 or less rear-guards cannot attack this unit.
(White Wings is active when your bind only has odd grades, and Black Wings when it only has even grades)
flavorTextEN: My feelings, which is the correct one...?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Glory is a temporary dream. Seek it while you already know it.

effectEN: White Wings (Active when your bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your rear-guards for every three of your units with odd grades, and it gets [Power]+5000/[Critical]+1 until end of turn. (Same unit cannot be chosen twice)

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & reveal 2 normal units from your hand, and put them on the bottom of your deck in any order], choose one of your vanguards, search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as that card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a [Power]8000 card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The song I learnt, I'll let you listen to it!

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)

[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)

(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Song is sung, draw a card, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your vanguard sung a Song this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if this unit is in the back row center, Counter Charge (1).
[AUTO](RC):When your other unit is placed on (VC) or (RC), if your opponent’s vanguard is grade 3 or greater, [COST] Counter Blast (1), until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.

[AUTO](Back Row RC):When your other <Ghost> is placed on (RC) during your battle phase, [Stand] this unit.

[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have another <Ghost> on (RC), choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Having the reputation of treating souls roughly.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to one <Ghost> in your drop, and put it into your hand.
[CONT](VC/RC):During your turn, if you have a <Ghost> on your (RC), this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: Chosen to be the companion on an off day. That is an unparalleled honor.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: That's a good song. Did you write it yourself?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a vanguard, draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Nearly late, but keeping a smile even while sprinting full out.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], choose a Precious Stone card from your drop, and put it into your hand.

[AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard with "Earnescorrect" in its card name is retired during your opponent's turn, if this unit is on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], and put that retired card into your hand.
[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard's attack hits, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I can see it! Is that our "battlefield"!?

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by riding on "Dignified Will, Clarissa", look at seven cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 1 or less card with "Earnescorrect" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, shuffle the rest and put them on the bottom of your deck.
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if you do not have any rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This is the path I decided on. I'll definitely grab the chance to debut!

flavorTextEN: Yay ♪ How was it? Wasn't that a clean ending?

flavorTextEN: Yep! I'd also want to be like an idol that came out of a fairy tale!

nameEN: Lively Motion that Shakes the Skies, Maribuel
effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[CONT](VC/RC):During your opponent's turn, this unit gets [Power]-2000.

White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each of your other units with odd grades.
flavorTextEN: The pure white without any filth. And a clear tone that washes the hearts.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you played an order this turn, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Nom nom. This one's a hit.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC)1/Turn :When your other unit is placed on (RC) during your battle phase, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: "Sweet treats" are an absolute essential for evening parties.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When your other <Ghost> is placed on (RC) during your battle phase, [Stand] this unit.

[AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard with "Earnescorrect" in its card name is retired during your opponent's turn, if this unit is on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], and put that retired card into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Suddenly disappearing, that's terrible of you~.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard is placed in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: M-me, at the evening party? Is it not a bother…?

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If the number of your rear-guards is zero or is four or more, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.

nameEN: Another Aubade in the Eternity, Irene
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a <Ghost> normal unit rear-guard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, you may put the boosted rear-guard on the bottom of your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your "Romantic Happiness" was sung this turn, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Even the boring route to school, becomes a slightly special path.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other rear-guard is placed in the same column as this unit, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard's grade is less than or equal to the grade of your opponent's vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.

[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, if you have a vanguard with "Clarissa" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], search your deck for up to one grade 3 or less card with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.

[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, if you have a vanguard with "Clarissa" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], search your deck for up to one grade 3 or less card with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: That is a really good song. Did you write it, by any chance?

nameEN: Speaker of the Heavenly Voice, Heluel
effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card with the White Wings ability other than "Speaker of the Heavenly Voice, Heluel" from your drop, and call it to an open (RC).

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your vanguard's grade is equal to or less than your opponent's vanguard's grade, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Taking a different path, on days with the inclination to take it slow.

effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card with the White Wings ability from your drop not named "Spokesperson of Heavenly Voice, Herjuel", and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: I'll give you my endorsement! You definitely have the talent!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Astesice" in its card name, choose a grade 2 or less card from your soul with "Astesice" in its card name, and you may call it to an open (RC) as [Rest]. If you called it during your battle phase, [Stand] that called unit.
flavorTextEN: A dance that you find yourself following before noticing. That is the kind of dance to be aimed for.

effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[CONT](GC):This unit gets [Shield]+10000.

(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Song is sung, draw a card, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
Nimbly turning
Within the palms
A new premonition

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], perform all of the following according to the Songs sung this turn.
•"Romantic Happiness" - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•"Twilight Sound of Waves" - Look at the top card of your deck.
•"Madder Red Runway" - You may return this unit to your hand.
•"Six-Flower Fractale" - COST  [Discard a card from your hand], and draw a card.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other <Ghost> is placed on another (RC) in the same column as this unit, choose a card with "Feltyrosa" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your soul.

[ACT](VC/RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1) & Discard a card from your hand], and draw a card.
Powerful-[CONT](VC):If your soul has no cards, when you would ride "Attract Peach, Ertines" from your ride deck, you can ride without discarding a card from your hand.
flavorTextEN: If you are bewitched by the devil, it won't end well for you.

effectEN:
Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has no cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with the Powerful ability, [Stand] this unit, choose a card from your soul, and put it into your drop. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: The singing voice is high and far away. Wherever.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard two cards from your hand], and draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: To make them think "I want to follow you", is also a type of talent.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose up to two non-grade 1 normal units from your drop, return them to your deck and shuffle it.
[ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], choose up to two non-grade 1 normal units from your drop, return them to your deck and shuffle it.
flavorTextEN: Of course! I will be the one that shines the brightest!
